case_title: JAMES PAUL MCALLISTER ET AL VS. JOHN MATTHEN HANNAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-01-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCALLISTER, JAMES PAUL MCALLISTER, MEGHAN AS TO DEFENDANT HANNAN, JOHN MATTHEN DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-10-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-06-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-17-2017
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 60846901)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-10-2017 CONTINUED TO JUN-21-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-01-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-21-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
